title: Judge dismisses Kash Patel's defamation lawsuit over claim he frequented 'nightclubs'
summary_full: The lawsuit against Frank Figliuzzi was dismissed a day after FBI Director Kash Patel sued The Atlantic magazine over claims he abused alcohol.
summary_public: The lawsuit against Frank Figliuzzi was dismissed a day after FBI Director Kash Patel sued The Atlantic magazine over claims he abused alcohol.
